rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and claude-haiku, confirmed by visual inspection.
Consensus between gemini-flash and claude-haiku, confirmed by visual inspection.

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku incorrectly identified this as a header and misread the description ('From Endowgy Fund'). Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (364 pounds, 2 shillings, 0 pence indicated by a dash).
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku missed this total line and included hallucinated rows ('Subs 1', 'Subs 2') instead, which were dropped. Visual inspection confirms amounts and total line.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (60 pounds, with dashes indicating 0 shillings and pence).

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku misidentified this header as 'Reversion Fund' (CH R6) and placed it incorrectly. Visual inspection confirms 'Pension Fund'.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Dividends & Interest' and pounds amount '722'. claude-haiku (CH R7 'Dividend & Interest') misread pounds as '72'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms 'Sale of Shillingstone Survey' and pounds amount '2102'. claude-haiku (CH R8 'Sale of Marketable Securities, being From Centre Fund') misread both description and pounds as '202'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms the full description and the explicit dashes for 0 shillings and 0 pence. claude-haiku (CH R9 '200') missed the description and left shillings/pence blank.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms empty description and pounds amount '3024'. claude-haiku (CH R10 'Balance brought forward') added a description and misread pounds as '3244'.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row and included an incorrectly placed header (CH R11). Visual inspection confirms description and amounts; the pounds figure is '2101'.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (3 pounds, 17 shillings, 0 pence, indicated by a dash).
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (900 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence, indicated by dashes).
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (18 pounds, 17 shillings, 2 pence). The '2' is slightly faint but visible.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms amounts and double-underlined total line.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku did not align with this row. Visual inspection confirms 'Local Rates' as a header.

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku (CH R17) misread the description as 'Local Rate Competition Fund' and misidentified its side/span. Visual inspection confirms 'Composition Fund' as a right-side header.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms the description as 'Transfer from Compositions (General Acct.II)'. claude-haiku (CH R18 'A transfer from Composition (Dame Court)') misread 'General Acct.II' as 'Dame Court'. Amounts are consistent.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms pounds amount '37'. claude-haiku (CH R19) misread as '19'.

Overrode both extractors. Visual inspection confirms pounds '7', shillings '9', and an explicit dash for 0 pence. claude-haiku (CH R20) misread all amounts. gemini-flash correctly identified amounts but stated pence was 'assumed' rather than explicitly present (as a dash).

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms description 'Balance at begin of acct.' and pounds amount '97'. claude-haiku (CH R21 'Balance beginning fund') misread description and pounds as '27'.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms row type 'total', empty description, and amounts including an explicit dash for 0 pence. claude-haiku (CH R22 '152 18') misidentified row type, description, and failed to recognize the dash for pence.

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku completely missed this row and hallucinated/misplaced entries (CH R23-R26) instead, which were dropped. Visual inspection confirms description and amounts (152 pounds, 18 shillings, 0 pence, indicated by a dash).

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms row type 'total', empty description, and amounts including an explicit dash for 0 pence. claude-haiku (CH R28 '152 18') misidentified row type, description, and failed to recognize the dash for pence.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku (CH R29) misread as 'Lecture Fund'. Visual inspection confirms 'Tuition Fund' as a header.

Overrode gemini-flash's note for pence, selected gemini-flash for values. claude-haiku (CH R30 'Lecture Fees') misread description and pounds ('192'). Visual inspection confirms description 'Tuition Fees', pounds '2723', shillings '14', and an explicit dash for 0 pence.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku (CH R31 'Dividends Finance') misread description and pence ('0'). Visual inspection confirms description 'Dividends & Interest' and pence '5'.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku missed this row and included an invented header (CH R32). Visual inspection confirms description and amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection confirms row type 'total', empty description, pounds '257', shillings '13', and pence '4'. claude-haiku (CH R47 '227 13 1') misidentified row type and description, and misread pounds as '227' and pence as '1'.
Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku missed this row and included an invented header (CH R48 'Paint & Bookshelves'). Visual inspection confirms description and amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku (CH R49 'Balance at charged') misread description and hallucinated amounts. Visual inspection confirms description 'Balance at close of acct.' and explicit '..' for no amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. claude-haiku (CH R51 'Undergraduate Reading Room Fund') missed the 's' in 'Undergraduates'. Visual inspection confirms 'Undergraduates Reading Room Fund' as a header.
